faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our web development services

items.q: What types of websites does BigHero Studio develop?
items.a: We develop all types of websites including Corporate Websites, E-Commerce platforms, Booking systems, Dashboards, and complex custom Web Applications.

items.q: What is the process of building a website with you?
items.a: Our process includes: 1. Requirement gathering 2. Quotation & Timeline 3. UI/UX Design & Architecture 4. Development 5. Delivery & Basic Training.

items.q: Will my website rank on Google (SEO)?
items.a: Yes, we build websites with a 100% SEO-friendly structure, including optimized Meta Tags, fast PageSpeed, and mobile responsiveness to give you the best chance of ranking.
Absolutely. We offer a 1-year warranty for bug fixes and free consultation throughout the usage period.
